title: Due lettere anonime
writer: Ivo Perilli, Mario Camerini, Carlo Musso
actors: Clara Calamai, Andrea Checchi, Otello Toso
plot: After years at the Russion front in WW II, the Italian soldier Bruno returns home. But he receives an anonymous letter warning him that during his absence, his fiancée Gina has begun an love affair with Tullio, his friend and work...
